debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
⊢ Fintype.card ↑(ch04.U k) = Fintype.card ↑(ch04.T k)

failed_attempts:
let f : T k ≃ U k :=
  { toFun := fun s => if h : s.1 ∈ U k then ⟨s.1, h⟩ else ⟨linearInvo k s.1, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := s.1
      have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
        exact hk.out.not_isSquare ⟨(x + y).natAbs, by zify; rw [Int.natAbs_sq, h_sq]⟩
      simp [U, linearInvo, hS] at *; linarith ⟩
    invFun := fun u => if h : u.1 ∈ T k then ⟨u.1, h⟩ else ⟨linearInvo k u.1, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := u.1
      have : z ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        have : (4 * x * y + z ^ 2) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := by rw [hS]
        simp [h_eq] at this
      simp [T, linearInvo, hS] at *; linarith ⟩
    left_inv := fun s => by
      simp; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3
      · rfl
      · obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := s.1
        simp [linearInvo, U] at h2; linarith
      · obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := s.1
        simp [linearInvo, T] at h3; linarith
      · exact Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1)
    right_inv := fun u => by
      simp; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3
      · rfl
      · obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := u.1
        simp [linearInvo, T] at h2; linarith
      · obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := u.1
        simp [linearInvo, U] at h3; linarith
      · exact Subtype.ext (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) u.1) }
  exact Fintype.card_congr f
exact Windmill.card_T_eq_card_U k

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf_inv (s : S k) : f (f s) = s := by
    have := congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
    simp [Function.End.one_def] at this; exact this
  have h_half (V : Set (S k)) (hV : ∀ s, s ∉ V ↔ f s ∈ V) : 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl V]
    congr; apply Fintype.card_congr
    exact { toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, (hV (f s)).mpr hs⟩,
            invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, (hV s).mp hs⟩,
            left_inv := fun _ => by simp [hf_inv],
            right_inv := fun _ => by simp [hf_inv] }
  rw [← Nat.mul_left_inj (by norm_num : 0 < 2), h_half (T k), h_half (U k)]
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩
    simp [U, f, linearInvo]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0
      have : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; nlinarith
      exact hk.out.not_pow (by norm_num) ⟨(x + y).natAbs, this⟩
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  · rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩
    simp [T, f, linearInvo]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz
      have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by nlinarith
      have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) % 4 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 4 := by rw [this]
      norm_num at this
    exact this.symm.lt_or_lt

let f := linearInvo k
  let g : S k → S k := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp [S] at h ⊢; exact h⟩
  have hf_invo : f ∘ f = id := linearInvo_sq k
  have hg_invo : g ∘ g = id := by funext s; ext <;> simp [g]
  have hf : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ f s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, f, linearInvo, S]
    intro h_zero
    have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      have : z = y - x := by linarith
      nlinarith [h.1]
    have : Nat.Prime ((x + y).natAbs ^ 2) := by
      rwa [Int.ofNat_inj.symm, Int.natAbs_sq, h_sq]
    exact Nat.not_prime_pow (by norm_num) this
  have hg : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ g s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, g, S]
    intro h0; have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [h.1, h0]
    have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := by rw [this]
    simp at this
  have h_card (P : Set (S k)) (i : S k → S k) (hi : ∀ s, s ∈ P ↔ i s ∉ P) (hi_invo : i ∘ i = id) :
      2 * Fintype.card P = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_compl_set P, two_mul, add_right_inj]
    apply Fintype.card_congr
    exact { toFun := fun s => ⟨i s, (hi s).mp s.2⟩,
            invFun := fun s => ⟨i s, (hi (i s)).mpr (by have := congr_fun hi_invo s.1; rwa [this] at s; exact s.2)⟩,
            left_inv := fun s => by ext; exact congr_fun hi_invo s,
            right_inv := fun s => by ext; exact congr_fun hi_invo s }
  apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (show 0 < 2 by norm_num)
  rw [h_card (U k) f hf hf_invo, h_card (T k) g hg hg_invo]

let f := linearInvo k; let g (s : S k) : S k := if s ∈ U k ↔ s ∈ T k then s else f s
  have h_ne (s : S k) : (s.1.2.2 ≠ 0) ∧ (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0) := by
    obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩ := s; refine ⟨by intro hz; apply_fun (ZMod 4) at hS; simp [hz] at hS, ?_⟩
    intro h; have : (x + y).toNat ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; nlinarith

    have := h_ne s; simp [f, linearInvo, U, T]; omega

  refine Equiv.ofInvolutive g (fun s ↦ ?_) (fun s ↦ ?_)

  · dsimp [g]; intro s; split_ifs <;> (have := h_ne s; simp [f, linearInvo, U, T] at *; omega)

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf : f ∘ f = id := linearInvo_sq k
  have hV (V : Set (S k)) (hV_iff : ∀ s, s ∈ V ↔ f s ∉ V) : 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : Fintype.card V = Fintype.card Vᶜ := Fintype.card_congr
      { toFun := fun s => ⟨f s, (hV_iff s).mp s.2⟩,
        invFun := fun s => ⟨f s, by have := (hV_iff (f s)).mpr; rw [congr_fun hf] at this; exact this s.2⟩,
        left_inv := fun _ => by simp [congr_fun hf],
        right_inv := fun _ => by simp [congr_fun hf] }
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl V, this, two_mul]
  apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num : 0 < 2)
  rw [hV (T k), hV (U k)]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩
    simp [linearInvo, U, S] at *
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
      apply hk.out.not_isSquare; exact ⟨(x + y).natAbs, by zify; nlinarith⟩
    constructor <;> intro <;> nlinarith
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩

let f : S k → S k := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp [S] at h ⊢; exact h⟩
  have hf : ∀ s, f (f s) = s := by intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [f]
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      rintro rfl; have : (4 * x * y + 0 ^ 2) % 4 = (4 * k + 1) % 4 := congr_arg (· % 4) h.1
      simp at this
    simp [T, f]; linarith
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ U k := by
    rintro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0; apply hk.out.not_square (x + y).natAbs
      zify; rw [Int.natAbs_sq]; nlinarith [h.1, h0]
    simp [U, linearInvo]; linarith
  have h_card (A : Set (S k)) (g : S k ≃ S k) (hg : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ g s ∉ A) :
    2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_compl A, ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeCompl g hg), two_mul]
  apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num : 0 < 2)
  rw [h_card (T k) (Equiv.ofInvolutive f hf) hT, h_card (U k) (Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (linearInvo_sq k)) hU]

let f := linearInvo k
  have h_f s : f (f s) = s := by obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; rfl
  have h_z s : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    have h := s.2.1; obtain ⟨_, _, z⟩ := s.1; rw [← z] at h; omega
  have h_xyz s : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro hxyz; obtain ⟨x, y, z⟩ := s.1; have h := s.2.1
    have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; rw [← h]; nlinarith
    exact hk.out.not_perfect_pow (by norm_num) ⟨(x + y).natAbs, h_sq⟩
  have h_U s : f s ∈ U k ↔ s ∉ U k := by simp [U, f, linearInvo]; have := h_xyz s; omega
  have h_T s : f s ∈ T k ↔ s ∉ T k := by simp [T, f, linearInvo]; have := h_z s; omega
  apply Fintype.card_congr
  exact {
    toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => if hus : s ∈ U k then ⟨s, hus⟩ else ⟨f s, (h_U s).mpr hus⟩,
    invFun := fun ⟨s, hus⟩ => if hts : s ∈ T k then ⟨s, hts⟩ else ⟨f s, (h_T s).mpr hts⟩,
    left_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => by simp only; split_ifs <;> simp [h_f, *] at *,
    right_inv := fun ⟨s, hus⟩ => by simp only; split_ifs <;> simp [h_f, *] at *
  }

let g := linearInvo k
  have h_z (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have h1 := s.2.1; rw [h] at h1
    apply_fun (fun n => n % (4 : ℤ)) at h1; simp [Int.mul_emod] at h1
  have h_xyz (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have h1 := s.2.1; have h2 : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← h1, ← h]; ring
    exact hk.out.not_isSquare ⟨(s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs, by zify; rw [sq, ← Int.natAbs_mul, ← sq]; exact h2⟩
  let f (s : S k) : S k := if s ∈ T k ↔ s ∈ U k then s else g s
  have h_f : ∀ s, (f s ∈ U k ↔ s ∈ T k) ∧ f (f s) = s := by
    intro s; simp [f, T, U, linearInvo]; have := h_z s; have := h_xyz s
    split_ifs <;> simp [linearInvo, linearInvo_sq, *] <;> tauto
  exact Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.ofBijective (fun s : T k => ⟨f s, (h_f s).1.mpr s.2⟩)
    ⟨fun s t h => by injection h with h; apply_fun f at h; simp [(h_f _).2] at h; exact Subtype.ext h,
     fun s => ⟨⟨f s, (h_f (f s)).1.mp (by rw [(h_f s).2]; exact s.2)⟩, by simp [(h_f s).2]⟩⟩)

classical
  have h_card (A : Set (S k)) (f : S k → S k) (hf : ∀ s, f (f s) = s) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s ∉ A) :
      2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl A, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeCongr (Equiv.ofInvolutive f hf) hA), two_mul]
  let f (s : S k) : S k := ⟨⟨s.1.1, s.1.2.1, -s.1.2.2⟩, by have h := s.2; simp [S] at h ⊢; linarith [h.1]⟩
  have hf : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩; simp [T, f]; simp [S] at hS
    have : z ≠ 0 := by intro h0; have : 4 * (x * y) = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [hS.1, h0]; omega
    simp [this, lt_or_gt_of_ne]
  have hg : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩; simp [U, linearInvo]; simp [S] at hS
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0; have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [h0, hS.1]
      exact Nat.Prime.not_perfect_square hk.out (x + y).natAbs (by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, this]; simp)
    simp [this, lt_or_gt_of_ne]; omega
  rw [← h_card (T k) f (by intro; simp [f]) hf, ← h_card (U k) (linearInvo k) (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k)) hg]

let σ := linearInvo k
  have hV (V : Set (S k)) [Fintype V] (h : ∀ s, σ s ∈ V ↔ s ∉ V) : 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl V, ← Nat.two_mul, add_left_inj]
    exact Fintype.card_congr ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, (h _).mp (by rwa [linearInvo_sq] at hs)⟩,
      fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨σ s, (h _).mpr hs⟩, fun _ => by simp [linearInvo_sq], fun _ => by simp [linearInvo_sq]⟩
  rw [← Nat.mul_left_inj (show 2 ≠ 0 from by norm_num), hV (T k), hV (U k)]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hx⟩; simp [U, linearInvo]; intro; have := hk.out.not_pow (by norm_num) (n := (x + y).natAbs)
    nlinarith [hx.1]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hx⟩; simp [T, linearInvo]; nlinarith [hx.1]

classical
  let f := linearInvo k
  have h_card (A : Set (S k)) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [two_mul, ← Fintype.card_compl_set A, ← Fintype.card_congr (e := {
      toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, (hA s).mp hs⟩
      invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨f s, by have := hA (f s); rw [congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s] at this; exact this.mpr hs⟩
      left_inv := fun s => by ext; exact congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1
      right_inv := fun s => by ext; exact congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1 }), Fintype.card_add_compl]
  have hT : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, linearInvo]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; have := h.1; simp [hz] at this; apply_fun (· % 4) at this; norm_num at this
    linarith
  have hU : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ f s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, linearInvo]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq; have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        zify [Int.natAbs_sq]; linarith [h.1, h_eq, h.2.1, h.2.2]
      have h_p := hk.out; rw [← h_sq] at h_p; exact h_p.sq_not_prime
    linarith
  apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num : 0 < 2)
  rw [h_card (T k) hT, h_card (U k) hU]

let f := Equiv.ofInvolutive (fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by
    simp [S] at h ⊢; exact ⟨by rw [neg_pow_two, h.1], h.2⟩⟩) (by intro s; ext <;> simp)
  let g := Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (fun s => by rw [← Function.End.pow_apply, linearInvo_sq]; rfl)
  have hf_fix : ∀ s, f s ≠ s := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; intro hf
    simp at hf; have : z = 0 := by linarith
    have h1 := h.1; rw [this] at h1; apply_fun (fun n => (n : ZMod 4)) at h1; simp at h1
  have hg_fix : ∀ s, g s ≠ s := fun s hg => (linearInvo_no_fixedPoints k).false ⟨s, hg⟩
  have hf_mem : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; simp [T, f]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz; apply hf_fix s; ext; exact hz
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  have hg_mem : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ g s ∉ U k := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; simp [U, g, linearInvo]
    have hne : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro heq; have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [h.1, heq]
      exact Nat.Prime.not_isSquare hk.out ⟨(x + y).natAbs, by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, this]; simp⟩
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  rw [← mul_right_inj' (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0),
    ← Fintype.card_eq_two_mul_card_disjoint_union f f.left_inv hf_fix hf_mem,
    ← Fintype.card_eq_two_mul_card_disjoint_union g g.left_inv hg_fix hg_mem]

have h_z (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun hz ↦ by
    have := s.2.1; simp [hz] at this; subst this; revert s.2.2.1; norm_num
  have h_u (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun hu ↦ by
    have h_p := hk.out; have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [s.2.1]
    have h_sq : s.1.1 + s.1.2.1 ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← this, sq]; exact dvd_mul_left _ _
    cases h_p.dvd_iff_eq_one_or_self.1 h_sq with
    | inl h1 => linarith [s.2.2.1, s.2.2.2]
    | inr h2 => rw [h2, sq, mul_self_eq_self] at this; exacts [h_p.not_unit (by simp [this]), h_p.ne_zero]
  rw [← Set.toFinset_card, ← Set.toFinset_card,
      ← Finset.card_sdiff_add_card_inter (T k).toFinset (U k).toFinset,
      ← Finset.card_sdiff_add_card_inter (U k).toFinset (T k).toFinset,
      Finset.inter_comm, Set.toFinset_diff, Set.toFinset_diff]
  congr 1; apply Finset.card_congr (fun s _ ↦ linearInvo k s)
  · intro s; simp [T, U, linearInvo, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]; intro; constructor <;> nlinarith [h_z s, h_u s]
  · intro s1 s2 _ _; simp [linearInvo]; exact Subtype.ext ∘ Subtype.ext_iff.1
  · intro b; simp [T, U, linearInvo, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]; intro hb; use linearInvo k b
    simp [linearInvo]; constructor <;> nlinarith [h_z b, h_u b, hb.1, hb.2]

let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_σ s : σ (σ s) = s := congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  let f (V : Set (S k)) (hV : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ V ↔ σ s ∉ V) : V ≃ Vᶜ :=
  { toFun := fun s => ⟨σ s.1, (hV s.1).mp s.2⟩,
    invFun := fun s => ⟨σ s.1, (hV (σ s.1)).mpr s.2⟩,
    left_inv := fun s => Subtype.ext (h_σ s.1),
    right_inv := fun s => Subtype.ext (h_σ s.1) }
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ σ s ∉ T k := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h_eq, h_x, h_y⟩ := s
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; rw [hz] at h_eq
      have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 4 = (4 * x * y) % 4 := congr_arg (· % 4) h_eq
      simp at this
    simp [T, σ, linearInvo]; omega
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ σ s ∉ U k := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h_eq, h_x, h_y⟩ := s
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by rw [← h_eq, ← h]; ring
      have h_sq_nat : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, h_sq]; norm_cast
      exact hk.out.not_isSquare ⟨(x + y).natAbs, h_sq_nat.symm⟩
    simp [U, σ, linearInvo]; omega
  rw [Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl (T k)).symm, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl (U k)).symm]
  simp [Fintype.card_congr (f (T k) hT), Fintype.card_congr (f (U k) hU)]

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf : ∀ s, f (f s) = s := fun s => congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  have hT : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, _, _⟩
    simp [T, linearInvo, f]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; simp [hz] at h; apply_fun (· % 4) at h
      simp [Int.add_emod, Int.mul_emod] at h; norm_num at h
    omega
  have hU : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ f s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩
    simp [U, linearInvo, f]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have h_sq : (x + y : ℤ) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        have : z = y - x := by omega
        rw [this] at h
        ring_nf at h ⊢; exact h
      have h_prime : (4 * k + 1).Prime := Fact.out
      apply_fun Int.natAbs at h_sq
      simp [Int.natAbs_pow, Int.natAbs_ofNat] at h_sq
      rw [← h_sq] at h_prime
      exact Nat.not_prime_pow (by norm_num) h_prime
    omega
  have h_card (A : Set (S k)) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : Fintype.card A = Fintype.card {x // x ∉ A} := by
      apply Fintype.card_congr
      refine' Equiv.ofBijective (fun s : A => ⟨f s.1, (hA s.1).mp s.2⟩) ⟨_, _⟩
      · intro s1 s2 heq; apply Subtype.ext; apply_fun f at heq; simpa [hf] using heq
      · intro s; use ⟨f s.1, (hA (f s.1)).mpr (by simpa [hf] using s.2)⟩; simp [hf]
    rw [← this, ← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_not (· ∈ A), two_mul]
  rw [← h_card (T k) hT, ← h_card (U k) hU]

let g := linearInvo k
  have hg : Involutive g := fun s => congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ g s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, linearInvo, g]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz; subst hz; have := h.1; omega
    omega
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ g s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, linearInvo, g]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; nlinarith [h.1, h_eq]
      exact (Nat.not_prime_sq (x + y).natAbs) (h_sq ▸ hk.out)
    omega
  rw [← Nat.mul_left_inj (show 2 ≠ 0 by norm_num)]
  have h_half (P : Set (S k)) (hP : ∀ s, s ∈ P ↔ g s ∉ P) : 2 * Fintype.card P = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [two_mul, ← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl (· ∈ P),
      Fintype.card_subtype_eq_card_subtype_compl g hP hg]
  rw [h_half (T k) hT, h_half (U k) hU]

let g (s : S k) : S k := ⟨⟨s.1.1, s.1.2.1, -s.1.2.2⟩, by obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; simp [S] at h ⊢; exact h⟩
  have hinv {X : Set (S k)} (i : S k → S k) (hi1 : ∀ s, i (i s) = s) (hi2 : ∀ s, i s ∈ X ↔ s ∉ X) :
      Fintype.card X * 2 = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : Fintype.card X = Fintype.card (Xᶜ : Set (S k)) :=
      Fintype.card_congr ⟨fun s => ⟨i s, by intro h; have := (hi2 (i s)).mpr h; rw [hi1] at this; exact this s.2⟩,
        fun s => ⟨i s, (hi2 (i s)).mp s.2⟩, fun s => by simp [hi1], fun s => by simp [hi1]⟩
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl X, this, two_mul]
  apply Nat.mul_right_cancel (show 0 < 2 by norm_num)
  rw [hinv (linearInvo k) (fun s => by obtain ⟨s, h⟩ := s; simp [linearInvo]) (by
        intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩; simp [linearInvo, U]
        have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
          intro h0; have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; nlinarith [hS, h0]
          have : ¬(4 * k + 1).Prime := by rw [← h_sq]; apply Nat.not_prime_sq
          exact this hk.out
        omega),
      hinv g (by intro; simp [g]) (by
        intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩; simp [g, T]
        have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz; nlinarith [hS]
        omega)]

let e : S k ≃ S k := ⟨linearInvo k, linearInvo k, congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k), congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k)⟩
  have hz (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have := s.2.1; rw [h] at this; omega
  have hxyz (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have hS := s.2.1
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := by rw [← hS, show s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 by omega]; ring
    exact hk.out.not_perfect_square (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs (by zify; simp [this])
  have hT s : e s ∈ T k ↔ s ∉ T k := by simp [T, linearInvo]; have := hz s; omega
  have hU s : e s ∈ U k ↔ s ∉ U k := by simp [U, linearInvo]; have := hxyz s; omega
  rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl (T k), ← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl (U k),
    Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeCompl e hT), Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeCompl e hU)]
  omega

have h_z : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩ hz
    subst hz
    have : (4 * (x * y) : ℤ) = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [h.1]
    have : (4 * (x * y) : ℤ) % 4 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 4 := by rw [this]
    norm_num at this
  let e1 : S k ≃ S k := Equiv.ofInvolutive (fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by
    simp [S] at h ⊢; exact ⟨by linarith [h.1], h.2.1, h.2.2⟩⟩) (by intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp)
  have he1 : ∀ s, s ∈ T k ↔ e1 s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, e1, h_z ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩]; constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  have h_u : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩ h_u
    have h_sq : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, (by nlinarith : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1), Int.natAbs_ofNat]
    exact (Fact.out : (4 * k + 1).Prime).not_perfect_square (x + y).natAbs h_sq
  let e2 : S k ≃ S k := Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (fun s => by
    simpa using DFunLike.congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s)
  have he2 : ∀ s, s ∈ U k ↔ e2 s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, e2, linearInvo, h_u ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩]; constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl (fun s => s ∈ T k),
      ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquiv e1 he1), two_mul]
  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl (fun s => s ∈ U k),
      ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquiv e2 he2), two_mul]
  rw [← hT, hU, Nat.mul_left_inj (by norm_num)]

let f := linearInvo k
  let g : S k → S k := fun s => if (s ∈ T k ↔ s ∈ U k) then s else f s
  have hf : ∀ s : S k, (f s ∈ T k ↔ s ∉ T k) ∧ (f s ∈ U k ↔ s ∉ U k) := by
    intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩ := s
    obtain ⟨hx, hy⟩ := S_lower_bound k hS
    have hz : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz; have := hS.1; rw [hz] at this; apply_fun (· % 4) at this; norm_num at this
    have hu : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; have h_sq : (x + y)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [hS.1]
      have : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, h_sq]; simp
      exact hk.out.not_pow (by norm_num) ⟨_, this⟩
    simp [f, linearInvo, T, U, hS.1]; constructor <;> constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  have hg : Function.Involutive g := fun s => by
    simp [g]; split_ifs <;> simp [congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s, *] <;> (have := hf s; tauto)
  exact Fintype.card_congr ((Equiv.ofInvolutive g hg).subtypeEquiv (fun s => by
    have := hf s; simp [g]; tauto))

let f := linearInvo k
  let hA (A : Set (S k)) (h : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ f s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [Fintype.card_eq_sum_card_complement A, two_mul, add_right_inj]
    apply Fintype.card_congr
    refine ⟨fun s => ⟨f s.1, (h s.1).mp s.2⟩, fun s => ⟨f s.1, by simpa [linearInvo_sq k] using (h (f s.1)).mpr s.2⟩,
      fun s => by ext; simp [linearInvo_sq k], fun s => by ext; simp [linearInvo_sq k]⟩
  rw [← hA (U k), ← hA (T k)]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, f, linearInvo]; constructor <;> intro hz
    · linarith
    · have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz0; have heq := h.1; simp [hz0] at heq; apply_fun (· % 4) at heq; simp at heq
      linarith
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, f, linearInvo]; constructor <;> intro hxyz
    · linarith
    · have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
        intro h0; have heq := h.1; have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
        exact (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).out.not_perfect_square (x + y).natAbs (by zify [Int.natAbs_sq]; rw [this]; norm_cast)
      linarith

let f := Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k))
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ f s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩
    simp [T, f, linearInvo]; constructor <;> intro hz
    · omega
    · have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz0; simp [hz0] at h; omega
      omega
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ f s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h, hx, hy⟩
    simp [U, f, linearInvo]
    have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 + (x - y + z) * (x - y - z) := by rw [← h]; ring
    have h_xyz_nz : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0
      have : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by zify; rw [sq_abs, h_sq, h0]; simp
      exact Nat.Prime.not_isSquare hk.out ⟨(x + y).natAbs, this.symm⟩
    constructor <;> intro <;> omega
  have h1 : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_compl_add (T k), ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquiv f hT)]; ring
  have h2 : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_compl_add (U k), ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquiv f hU)]; ring
  exact Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num) (h2.trans h1.symm)

let f := linearInvo k
  have h_z (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have h1 := s.2.1; rw [h] at h1
    have h2 : 4 * (s.1.1 * s.1.2.1 - k) = 1 := by linarith
    apply_fun (· % 4) at h2; norm_num at h2
  have h_xyz (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have hsq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [s.2.1]
    have : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).toNat ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.toNat_pow, hsq]; norm_num; linarith [s.2.2.1, s.2.2.2]
    exact square_ne_prime hk.out _ this
  apply Fintype.card_congr
  exact {
    toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => if h : s ∈ U k then ⟨s, h⟩ else ⟨f s, by
      simp [f, linearInvo, T, U] at hs h ⊢; linarith [h_xyz s]⟩,
    invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => if h : s ∈ T k then ⟨s, h⟩ else ⟨f s, by
      simp [f, linearInvo, T, U] at hs h ⊢; linarith [h_z s]⟩,
    left_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => by
      by_cases h : s ∈ U k <;> simp [h]
      have : f s ∉ T k := by simp [f, linearInvo, T] at hs ⊢; linarith
      simp [this, congr_fun linearInvo_sq s],
    right_inv := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => by
      by_cases h : s ∈ T k <;> simp [h]
      have : f s ∉ U k := by simp [f, linearInvo, U] at hs ⊢; linarith
      simp [this, congr_fun linearInvo_sq s] }

let ψ := linearInvo k; have hψ := linearInvo_sq k
  have hz : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s h => by
    have h1 := s.2.1; apply_fun (fun x => (x : ZMod 4)) at h1
    simp [h, Int.cast_add, Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_pow] at h1
  have hxyz : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s h => by
    have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [s.2.1, h]
    have h_abs : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, h_sq]; simp
    exact Nat.not_prime_pow (by norm_num) (by rw [← h_abs]; exact hk.out)
  have h_card : ∀ V : Set (S k), (∀ s, s ∈ V ↔ ψ s ∉ V) → 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := fun V hV => by
    have h1 : Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (Vᶜ : Set (S k)) := by
      apply Fintype.card_congr; refine ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨ψ s, (hV s).mp hs⟩,
        fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨ψ s, (hV (ψ s)).mpr (by rwa [congr_fun hψ s])⟩,
        fun _ => by ext; exact congr_fun hψ s, fun _ => by ext; exact congr_fun hψ s⟩
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_plus_card_subtype_compl V, h1, two_mul]
  apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (show 0 < 2 by norm_num)
  rw [h_card (U k), h_card (T k)]
  · intro s; simp [U, linearInvo]; constructor <;> intro <;> linarith [hxyz s]
  · intro s; simp [T, linearInvo]; constructor <;> intro <;> linarith [hz s]

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf (V : Set (S k)) (hV : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ V ↔ f s ∉ V) : 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : Fintype.card V = Fintype.card ↑Vᶜ := Fintype.card_congr
      { toFun := fun s => ⟨f s.1, (hV s.1).mp s.2⟩,
        invFun := fun s => ⟨f s.1, by have := (hV (f s.1)).mpr; rw [congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1] at this; exact this s.2⟩,
        left_inv := fun s => by ext; simp [congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1],
        right_inv := fun s => by ext; simp [congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s.1] }
    rw [← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.sumCompl V), card_sum, this, two_mul]
  rw [← Nat.mul_right_cancel_iff (by norm_num : 0 < 2), hf (U k), hf (T k)]
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩
    simp [linearInvo, T, S]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; rw [hz] at hS; apply_fun (· % 4) at hS
      simp at hS
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith
  · intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩
    simp [linearInvo, U, S]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz; have : (x + y)^2 = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
      apply Nat.Prime.not_square hk.out
      use (x + y).natAbs
      zify; rw [Int.natAbs_sq, this]
    constructor <;> intro <;> linarith

let f : S k → S k := fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ ↦ ⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp [S] at h ⊢; exact ⟨by linarith [h.1], h.2⟩⟩
  have h_card {P : Set (S k)} [DecidablePred P] {φ : S k → S k} (hφ : ∀ x, φ (φ x) = x) (hP : ∀ x, x ∈ P ↔ φ x ∉ P) : 2 * Fintype.card P = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_condition P, two_mul, add_left_inj, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquivProp hP |>.trans <| Equiv.subtypeComplSubtype fun _ ↦ .rfl)]
  refine Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num : 0 < 2) ((h_card (by intro; ext; simp) (by intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [T, f]; omega)).trans ?_)
  symm; refine h_card (fun x ↦ by rw [← Function.comp_apply, ← pow_two, linearInvo_sq k]; rfl) (by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩; simp [U, linearInvo]
    have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 + (x - y + z) * (x - y - z) := by nlinarith [h.1]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h0; rw [h0] at this; simp at this
      exact (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).out.not_perfect_square ⟨(x + y).natAbs, by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, this]; rfl⟩
    omega)

let e := Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k))
  have h (V : Set (S k)) (hV : ∀ s, s ∈ V ↔ e s ∉ V) : 2 * Fintype.card V = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl_add_card V, Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeCompl e hV)]
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ e s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
    simp [T, e, linearInvo]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by
      intro hz
      have := hs.1
      rw [hz] at this
      have : (4 * x * y) % 2 = (4 * k + 1) % 2 := by rw [this]
      norm_num at this
    omega
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ e s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
    simp [U, e, linearInvo]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro heq
      have hsq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
        linear_combination (norm_num : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * x * y + (x - y) ^ 2) + hs.1
        rw [← heq]; ring
      exact Nat.not_prime_pow (by norm_num) (by rw [← Int.natAbs_pow, hsq]; simp) hk.out
    omega
  exact Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num) (by rw [h (T k) hT, h (U k) hU])

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf : Involutive f := fun s => by ext; exact (congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s)
  have h_card (X : Set (S k)) (hX : ∀ s, s ∈ X ↔ f s ∉ X) : 2 * Fintype.card X = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : Fintype.card X = Fintype.card (Xᶜ : Set (S k)) :=
      Fintype.card_congr ⟨fun s => ⟨f s.1, (hX s.1).mp s.2⟩, fun s => ⟨f s.1, (hX (f s.1)).mpr (by simpa [hf s.1] using s.2)⟩, fun s => by ext; exact hf s.1, fun s => by ext; exact hf s.1⟩
    rw [this, ← Fintype.card_add_compl, two_mul]
  have h_uxz_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s h =>
    hk.out.not_isSquare ⟨(s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs, by zify; nlinarith [s.2.1, h]⟩
  have h_z_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s h => by
    have : (4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1 : ℤ) = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [s.2.1, h]
    have : (4 * s.1.1 * s.1.2.1 : ℤ) % 4 = (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) % 4 := by rw [this]
    norm_num at this
  rw [h_card (U k) (fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => by simp [U, f, linearInvo]; nlinarith [h_uxz_ne_zero ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩]),
      h_card (T k) (fun ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ => by simp [T, f, linearInvo]; nlinarith [h_z_ne_zero ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩])]

let f := linearInvo k; have hf := linearInvo_sq k
  have hnz (s : S k) : s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have hS := s.2.1; rw [h] at hS; apply_fun (· % 4) at hS; norm_num at hS
  have hnu (s : S k) : s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.natAbs_pow]; linarith [s.2.1]
    exact Nat.sq_not_prime (by have := s.2.2; omega) (by rwa [h_sq] at hk; exact hk.out)
  refine Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.mk (fun s => if h : s.1 ∈ U k then ⟨s.1, h⟩ else ⟨f s.1, ?_⟩)
    (fun s => if h : s.1 ∈ T k then ⟨s.1, h⟩ else ⟨f s.1, ?_⟩) ?_ ?_)
  all_goals
    simp (config := { contextual := true }) [T, U, linearInvo, f, hnz, hnu] at *
    split_ifs at * <;> simp [congr_fun hf] at * <;> omega
exact Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.subtypeEquiv (Equiv.ofInvolutive (Windmill.windmillInvo k) (congr_fun (Windmill.windmillInvo_sq k))) (Windmill.windmillInvo_mem_T_iff_mem_U k))

let f := linearInvo k
  have hf : ∀ s, f (f s) = s := fun s => Subtype.ext (FunLike.congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) s)
  have h_z : ∀ s : S k, s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s hz => by
    have h := s.2.1
    rw [hz] at h
    apply_fun (· % 4) at h
    simp at h
  have h_xyz : ∀ s : S k, s.1.1 - s.1.2.1 + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := fun s h_eq => by
    have h_sq : (s.1.1 + s.1.2.1) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← s.2.1]; have : s.1.2.2 = s.1.2.1 - s.1.1 := by linarith; rw [this]; ring
    exact hk.out.not_perfect_square ⟨(s.1.1 + s.1.2.1).natAbs, by
      rw [← Nat.cast_inj (R := ℤ), Int.natAbs_sq, h_sq]; norm_cast⟩
  apply Fintype.card_congr
  refine Equiv.mk (fun s => if h : (s : S k) ∈ U k then ⟨s, h⟩ else ⟨f s, ?_⟩)
                 (fun u => if h : (u : S k) ∈ T k then ⟨u, h⟩ else ⟨f u, ?_⟩) ?_ ?_
  · simp [U, linearInvo] at h ⊢; exact Int.lt_of_le_of_ne h (h_xyz s)
  · simp [T, linearInvo] at h ⊢; exact Int.lt_of_le_of_ne h (h_z u)
  · intro s; dsimp; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3
    · rfl
    · exact (h2 s.2).elim
    · simp [T, linearInvo] at h3; linarith [s.2, h3]
    · exact hf s
  · intro u; dsimp; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3
    · rfl
    · exact (h2 u.2).elim
    · simp [U, linearInvo] at h3; linarith [u.2, h3]
    · exact hf u
